P0.label: Truth Doesn't Care About the Bottle
P0.one_liner: True things stay true whoever says them.
P0.adult: Truth-value is substrate-independent. Credentials decay; Temes don't. Expertise increases discovery probability but does not manufacture validity.
P0.test: Would this still be true if my worst enemy said it?
P0.shield: P0 does not eliminate the burden of evidence; it relocates it from Authority to Replication.
P0.anchor: A gold bar weighs the same in a silk bag or a trash can.

P1.label: Feelings and Facts Live in Different Rooms
P1.adult: Emotional valence and factual validity are orthogonal. Feelings are primary data of interiority, not operators on exterior physics.
P1.test: Do I believe this because it feels good?
P1.shield: P1 does not invalidate emotional testimony as evidence of experience; it prevents affect from dictating physics.
P1.anchor: Screaming at a thermometer doesn't move the red line.

P2.label: The Map Is Not the Territory
P2.one_liner: Names are not the thing itself.
P2.adult: Representations are lossy models. Failure occurs when the label is managed as the referent. P2 rejects identity, not representation.
P2.test: If I remove the label, does the reality change?
P2.shield: The map is not the territory—AND the map can set the territory on fire (causal effect).
P2.anchor: The finger pointing at the moon is not the moon.

P3.label: The High-Score Trap
P3.one_liner: Chasing points can ruin the game.
P3.adult: Metric substitution: When a proxy signal (score) replaces the goal, the underlying competence atrophies (Goodhart failure).
P3.test: Would the score still go up if the actual goal collapsed?
P3.shield: P3 calls for better-coupled metrics, not the abolition of accountability.
P3.anchor: The game is over even if the clock is still running.

P4.label: The Squeeze Factor
P4.adult: Coercive pressure forces optimization for survival over fidelity. Distortion increases as a function of the magnitude of pressure.
P4.test: Are they telling me what is true or what is safe?
P4.shield: Pressure doesn't squeeze out truth—it squeezes out whatever makes the pressure stop.

P5.label: The Cup vs. The Ocean
P5.adult: Low-dimensional models omit information by mathematical necessity. Every summary is a lie of omission; the sin is forgetting it's a cup.
P5.test: What specific detail is this model forced to leave out?
P5.shield: P5 requires transparency of boundary conditions, not the abandonment of models.
P5.anchor: An ocean in a teacup leaves out the whales.

P6.label: Messages Change Unless Checked
P6.adult: In the absence of a correction layer (math/audit/check), transformational error compounds. Drift is the default state.
P6.test: Can I trace this back to a grounded source?
P6.shield: 98% correspondence is admirable, but it doesn't get the astronauts home.
P6.anchor: Every retelling is a photocopy of a photocopy.
